tasks.fmt: deno fmt --check deno.json sigil.config examples/promise/sigil.config examples/slotted/sigil.config spec/sigil-config.schema.json packages/sigil-core/deno.json packages/sigil-core/src packages/sigil-core/tests packages/sigil-cli/deno.json packages/sigil-cli/src packages/sigil-cli/tests scripts
tasks.test: deno task test:core && deno task test:cli && deno task test:skill
tasks.publish:dry-run: deno task --cwd packages/sigil-core publish:dry-run && deno task --cwd packages/sigil-cli publish:dry-run
